scripts.lighthouse: sh -c 'npm run start -- -p 3000 > /tmp/fair-play-lighthouse-next.log 2>&1 & server=$!; trap "kill $server" EXIT; sleep 5; lighthouse http://localhost:3000 --preset=desktop --output=json --output=html --output-path=./lighthouse-report --chrome-flags="--headless --no-sandbox"'
scripts.lighthouse:mobile: sh -c 'npm run start -- -p 3000 > /tmp/fair-play-lighthouse-next.log 2>&1 & server=$!; trap "kill $server" EXIT; sleep 5; lighthouse http://localhost:3000 --form-factor=mobile --screenEmulation.mobile=true --screenEmulation.width=390 --screenEmulation.height=844 --screenEmulation.deviceScaleFactor=3 --output=json --output=html --output-path=./lighthouse-report-mobile --chrome-flags="--headless --no-sandbox"'
